narrative: Middle East escalation and crude supply shocks drive a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY hits a 40-year high at 163.15 as the 275bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets JPY haven demand; gold higher +1.63%; equities +0.89%; DXY +0.25%; VIX 17.1. GBP/USD retreats to 1.3375 on cabinet changes and a 0.803% G10 bilateral spread vs USD. Watch the next ECB meeting on July 23.
